Journeys / Franciacorta

Franciacorta.
Brescia. Lake Iseo.

Italy's sparkling heart, where vineyards meet the water.

Duration 5 days · 4 nights
Group size Max 8 guests
Season April – October
Starting from On request
Franciacorta · Brescia · Lake Iseo
5 days · Max 8 guests · April – October Request this journey

Five days in Italy's
quietly spectacular
north

You'll taste Franciacorta where it's made, ride through vineyards on e-bikes, wander a car-free island on Lake Iseo, and sit down to long lunches that no guidebook will ever list.

This is the journey for travellers who want Italy unfiltered — real producers, real stories, real tables. Small group, personal host, no agenda beyond living it well.

Private cellars

Tastings at four Franciacorta producers — including Berlucchi, where it all began.

E-bike day

A full day riding through the vineyards, glass in hand, hills in every direction.

Monte Isola

Italy's largest lake island — no cars, fishing villages, time to wander.

Biodynamic farm

A morning at Il Colmetto — regenerative agriculture and a rustic lunch from the land.

Franciacorta vineyards
Brescia old town
Lake Iseo
Monte Isola
Cellar tasting

Day by day

Your five days

Day 1

Welcome to Brescia

+

Your journey begins in Brescia — a city where Roman ruins, Renaissance palaces and modern life exist in quiet harmony. Guests arrive by late morning and settle into their boutique hotel in the historic centre.

  • Welcome lunch at Santellone, a refined local institution blending tradition and creativity
  • Guided walk through Brescia's old town — Castello di Brescia, panoramic viewpoints, secret corners locals love
  • Aperitivo in the city centre
  • Welcome dinner featuring seasonal Lombard cuisine and the first pour of Franciacorta

Overnight: Boutique hotel, Brescia historic centre

Day 2

Taste, Tradition & City Life

+

The day starts with the aroma of roasting coffee at Torrefazione Agust — one of Italy's historic artisan roasters. A sensory immersion before the city wakes up.

  • Visit and tasting at Torrefazione Agust, including an in-depth look at the roasting process
  • Transfer to Tenuta Urbana — Brescia's unique urban vineyard — for a private tasting and lunch among the vines
  • Afternoon walking tour: Piazzale Arnaldo, Capitolium Roman ruins, Piazza della Loggia, artisan boutiques
  • Sweet pause with gelato at Ribera, followed by a cicchetto tasting at Amaro Zero Trenta

Overnight: Boutique hotel, Brescia

Day 3

Nature, Sustainability & Island Life

+

The day blends sustainable agriculture, lake views, and the slow rhythms of island life. After breakfast, guests check out of their Brescia hotel and head toward the water.

  • Morning visit to Il Colmetto — a pioneering biodynamic farm — with a rustic early lunch from the land
  • Ferry to Monte Isola, the peaceful car-free island at the heart of Lake Iseo
  • Stroll through fishing villages, artisan workshops, and scenic viewpoints
  • Sunset aperitivo in Sulzano, Darsena 21 — a lakeside village beloved by locals

Overnight: Boutique lakeside hotel, Iseo

Day 4

Franciacorta by E-Bike

+

The heart of the journey. A full day riding through the rolling hills of Franciacorta — one of Italy's most prestigious wine regions — experienced the way locals do: slowly, by bike.

  • Morning e-bike departure through vineyards, guided by an expert host
  • Private visit and tasting at Bersi Serlini, one of Franciacorta's most iconic producers
  • Exclusive tour and degustation at Guido Berlucchi — the winery where Franciacorta was born
  • Lunch and tasting menu among the vines at Il Giardino
  • Afternoon visits at Santus and Monte Rossa — two cutting-edge boutique wineries
  • Optional craft beer aperitivo at Birrificio Curtense before returning to Iseo

Overnight: Boutique lakeside hotel, Iseo

Day 5

The Lake, The Farewell, The Memories

+

The final day celebrates everything that makes this region special: water, wine, cuisine, and the connections built over five days of shared meals and unhurried mornings.

  • Private boat cruise departing from the hotel pier
  • Explore Sarnico and Paratico — charming twin towns with artisan shops and lakeside walks
  • Farewell gourmet lunch on the lake — a slow, elegant meal celebrating five days well spent
  • Parting gifts and curated local products to take home

Guests depart with memories — and connections — that last a lifetime.

What's
included

  • 4 nights boutique accommodation with breakfast
  • All guided visits, tastings, and expert-hosted tours
  • Private transfers and boat trip
  • E-bike rental for the full Franciacorta day
  • 3 gourmet dinners with curated wine pairings
  • 2 hosted lunches
  • OSTE host and concierge throughout
  • All entrance fees and activity costs

Not included

  • International flights
  • Travel insurance
  • Personal expenses

Signature moments

  • 1 Behind-the-scenes coffee tasting at Torrefazione Agust — before the city wakes up
  • 2 Private lunch among the vines at Tenuta Urbana — Brescia's urban vineyard
  • 3 Biodynamic farm immersion at Il Colmetto — a rustic lunch straight from the land
  • 4 Slow afternoon on Monte Isola — fishing villages, no cars, just the lake
  • 5 Four-winery e-bike day through Franciacorta — the heart of the journey
  • 6 Private farewell boat lunch across Lake Iseo — the perfect close

Ready to join
us in Franciacorta?

Departures April through October. Maximum 8 guests. All journeys are personally confirmed by us — tell us when you're thinking of travelling and we'll take it from there.
